name: USS SC-1347 (SC-1347)
events: 27 May 1944 Around 0700 R/27, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) departed from New London for New York where she arrived around 1625 R/27. She was escorted by SC-1347 (Lt.(jg.) J.E. Andresen, USNR). (1)

28 May 1944 Around 0700 R/28, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) departed from New York for Philadelphia where she is to refit at the Navy Yard. She was escorted by SC-1347 (Lt.(jg.) J.E. Andresen, USNR). (1)
